parsed_review.summary: CP00-861 extends the descriptor-only RP28 Marketplace permission decision matrix across RP28.P06.M00.S07-RP28.P06.M07.S06 (150 units, risk C). The implementation is complete and internally consistent: registry.js adds CP861 binding (chains CP860->CP862), requirements (deliverable counts 56/35/28/7/24 and micro-title counts both reconcile to 150), an 8-section/150-row case set, and Hermes/Claude/closeout/descriptor builders that hold the descriptor-only, no-runtime, no-product-write, no-real-data boundaries. validators.js adds thorough coverage and descriptor/contract validators that read the LIVE plan (non-circular) and enforce the authority boundary (claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human approval required for runtime opening). The contract JSON, validate script (chains CP845..CP861), and model.test.js (3 CP861 tests asserting empty errors, no writes, row_count 150, contract currency) are all consistent. createRow emits 20+ no-write/no-real-data attestations and the validator rejects any runtime/secret/real-data/product-write. Review hardening is satisfied: auth preflight passed (exit 0, valid JSON), tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob, no forbidden tools, no omitted active files. Claude remains read-only and non-approver; Hermes is used only for deterministic control-plane evidence (emits_runtime_receipt=false, not embedded in product runtime). The manifest is status=in_progress / production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false, which is the correct pre-review posture; the pending construction-inspection, adjudication, and claude-review-result states are expected and will be normalized by this receipt. The pack makes no runtime or enterprise-trust claim, so blocks_goal_closeout (this CP closeout goal) is false. No P0/P1/P2 issues found. One P3 informational note: this read-only review verified structure statically and did not execute the full validation suite, which runs post-review.

findings.title: Full post-review validation suite verified by structure only, not executed within this read-only review
findings.details: command-evidence.json records only the initial gate commands passing (rp28:marketplace:validate exit 0; node --test packages/marketplace/test/*.test.js exit 0) and notes that the full validation suite is required after review, adjudication, and queue regeneration before commit. As a read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob, no Bash), I verified the CP861 implementation, contract projection, validators, tests, manifest, and review artifacts statically and confirmed they are internally consistent and support the descriptor-verified production_ready claim; I did not execute npm run closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, npm run validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, or git diff --check. This is the expected closeout flow, not a defect in the pack.
findings.recommendation: Before flipping production_ready and committing, run the full validation suite listed in the baseline (closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack/test/validate/spec:requirements/weighted/fullplan/goal:closeout/rp00:control-plane validate plus git diff --check) after this review receipt is normalized, adjudication is updated, and the queue is regenerated; require all to pass.
